title: Project State Classification Report
description: Produced by discover-project-state-classifier during /setup and re-runnable at any time. Classifies the working directory into one of three maturity bands so downstream commands can pick appropriate defaults (stricter validation for brownfield, lighter for greenfield).

classification.description: greenfield = no committed source; growing-green = <30 non-test source files + no CI yet + no established conventions; brownfield = established codebase with existing conventions and/or CI.

confidence.description: low fires when signals contradict (e.g. large file count but no CI, or small codebase with a mature test suite). /setup should ask the user to confirm on low.

source_file_count.description: Count of non-test source files across detected languages.

has_lockfiles.description: True if uv.lock / package-lock.json / yarn.lock / pnpm-lock.yaml / Cargo.lock / go.sum is present — a signal of established dependency discipline.

first_commit_age_days.description: Days since the repo's first commit. 0 for a fresh git init with no commits.

notes.description: Human-readable observations — contradictory signals, user-visible heuristics, edge cases.
